mnemonics.title: UP Phases - IECT
mnemonics.content:
I - Inception (start)
E - Elaboration (expand)
C - Construction (create)
T - Transition (transfer)

mnemonics.title: UP Characteristics - UAIR
mnemonics.content:
U - Use-case driven
A - Architecture-centric
I - Iterative and incremental
R - Risk-focused
